#include <SFML/Graphics.hpp>
#include <cmath>

int main() {
    sf::RenderWindow window(sf::VideoMode(sf::Vector2u(800, 600)), "Light Game");

    // PLAYER
    sf::RectangleShape player(sf::Vector2f(40, 40));
    player.setFillColor(sf::Color::White);
    player.setPosition(sf::Vector2f(100.f, 100.f));

    float speed = 0.3f;

    // Light variable
    bool lightOn = false;

    sf::RectangleShape darkness(sf::Vector2f(800.f, 600.f));
    darkness.setFillColor(sf::Color(0, 0, 0, 220));

    // Switch
    sf::RectangleShape lightSwitch(sf::Vector2f(30.f, 30.f));
    lightSwitch.setFillColor(sf::Color::Yellow);
    lightSwitch.setPosition(sf::Vector2f(400.f, 300.f));

    // Door
    sf::RectangleShape door(sf::Vector2f(80.f, 150.f));
    door.setFillColor(sf::Color::Red);
    door.setPosition(sf::Vector2f(700.f, 225.f));
    bool doorOpen = false;

    // Obstacle
    sf::RectangleShape obstacle(sf::Vector2f(100.f, 50.f));
    obstacle.setFillColor(sf::Color::Green);
    obstacle.setPosition(sf::Vector2f(300.f, 400.f));

    while (window.isOpen()) {

        // EVENTS
        while (auto event = window.pollEvent()) {
            if (event->is<sf::Event::Closed>())
                window.close();
        }

        // MOVEMENT (SFML 3 style)
        if (sf::Keyboard::isKeyPressed(sf::Keyboard::Key::W))
            player.move(sf::Vector2f(0.f, -speed));

        if (sf::Keyboard::isKeyPressed(sf::Keyboard::Key::S))
            player.move(sf::Vector2f(0.f, speed));

        if (sf::Keyboard::isKeyPressed(sf::Keyboard::Key::A))
            player.move(sf::Vector2f(-speed, 0.f));

        if (sf::Keyboard::isKeyPressed(sf::Keyboard::Key::D))
            player.move(sf::Vector2f(speed, 0.f));
        
        // Distance between player and switch
        auto distance = sqrt(
            pow(player.getPosition().x - lightSwitch.getPosition().x, 2) +
            pow(player.getPosition().y - lightSwitch.getPosition().y, 2)
        );

        if (distance < 50.f) // aghar player switch ka kareeb hai
        {
            if (sf::Keyboard::isKeyPressed(sf::Keyboard::Key::Space))
            {
                lightOn = !lightOn; // toggle karo light
                if (lightOn) doorOpen = true; // light on hote he door open hoga
            }
            
        }
        

        // Light toggle (test key)
        if (sf::Keyboard::isKeyPressed(sf::Keyboard::Key::Space)) {
            lightOn = true;
        }

        // DRAW
        window.clear(sf::Color::Black);
        window.draw(player);

        // LightSwitch
        window.draw(lightSwitch);
        if (!doorOpen)
            window.draw(door);

        // obstacles
        if (lightOn)
        {
            window.draw(obstacle);
        }
        
        if (!lightOn)
            window.draw(darkness);
        window.display();
    }

    return 0;
}
